bookings.name: Name

notes.waitingForPaymentNote: Your booking request has been received. To continue, submit your crypto payment and transaction hash (TXID) before the payment window expires.
notes.bookingRequestSubmittedNote: Your booking request is awaiting review by the rental company. You will be notified once a decision has been made.
notes.paymentSubmittedSuccessfullyNote: Your transaction hash has been received and is currently being verified. This process may take some time depending on network confirmations.
notes.vehicleReservedNote: Your payment has been verified and a vehicle has been reserved for your selected rental period. Your booking is awaiting final approval.
notes.bookingApprovedNote: Your booking has been approved. Please arrive at the pickup location on the scheduled date with any required identification and documents.
notes.rentalInProgressNote: Your rental period is currently active. Please ensure the vehicle is returned on or before the agreed return date.
notes.rentalCompletedNotRated: This rental has been completed successfully. We would appreciate your feedback about your experience.
notes.rentalCompletedRated: This rental has been completed successfully. Thank you for choosing our service.
notes.bookingRequestRejectedNote: Unfortunately, this booking request could not be approved. You may submit a new booking request or contact the rental company for more information.
notes.bookingCancelledNote: This booking has been cancelled and will not proceed further.
notes.bookingExpiredNote: The payment or confirmation period expired before the booking could be completed. A new booking will be required if you still wish to rent this vehicle.
notes.paymentVerificationFailedNote:
Reason: {reason}

You may submit another valid transaction hash before the booking expires.

contact.whetherYouHaveQuestions: Whether you have questions, feedback, or partnership opportunities, we'd love to hear from you.
contact.ourTeamIsAlwaysHappy: Our team is always happy to answer your questions and help you enjoy the best of North Cyprus.
contact.whetherYouArePlanningYourTrip: Whether you're planning your trip, looking for transportation, or interested in partnering with Kipgo, our team is ready to help.
contact.ifYouAreNearby: If you're nearby, we'd be happy to welcome you.
contact.letsMakeYourNextJourney: Let's Make Your Next Journey Amazing
contact.weAreCommitted: We're committed to making travel across North Cyprus simple, convenient, and enjoyable.
contact.thankYouForChoosingKipgo: Thank you for choosing Kipgo. We look forward to being part of your next adventure.

about.exploreNothCyprus: Explore North Cyprus, the smarter way.
about.bringingTrustedTourismServices: Bringing trusted tourism services together into one seamless digital platform.
about.connectingTravelers: Connecting travelers with trusted tourism services across North Cyprus.
about.kipgoIsADigitalPlatform: Kipgo is a digital tourism platform designed to simplify the way people explore North Cyprus.
about.ourGoal: Our goal is to bring together trusted tourism services into one seamless platform, making travel easier, more convenient, and more enjoyable for both visitors and local residents.
about.fromTransportation: From transportation and accommodation to tours, activities, and other travel-related services, Kipgo is continuously expanding to provide everything travelers need in one place.
about.atThesameTime: At the same time, we help local tourism businesses connect with more customers through innovative digital solutions and a growing travel ecosystem.
about.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need for a memorable North Cyprus experience.
about.reliableTransportation: Reliable transportation services to help you travel comfortably and confidently across North Cyprus.
about.discoverQualityHotels: Discover quality hotels, apartments, and vacation stays suited to every travel style.
about.experienceTheBestAttractions: Experience the best attractions, adventures, and unforgettable moments throughout the island.
about.weConnectTravelers: We connect travelers with verified local tourism businesses delivering quality services.
about.designedToMakeDiscovering: Designed to make discovering North Cyprus easier for everyone.
about.ourVisionIsToBecome: Our vision is to become the leading tourism platform in North Cyprus while expanding our digital ecosystem to new destinations in the future.
about.whetherYouArePlanning: Whether you're planning your next adventure or looking for trusted tourism services, Kipgo is here to make every journey easier.
